# smc_command (Action)

Generic action to invoke the smc api. see [here](https://github.com/Forcepoint-NSP/terraform-provider-fp-ngfw-smc/blob/release/1.741.0/examples/engines/single_fw/single_fw_actions/main.tf) for a full example:

- engine initial_contact
- bind_license to an engine
- upload or refresh engine policy
- download sginfo
- engine go_offline, go_online, go_standby
- engine power_off, reboot
- create smc backup
- restart smc webswing server
- refresh admin domain policy


<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `command_href` (String) url to request the smc api

### Optional

- `body` (String) smc api body as raw text
- `method` (String) HTTP method to use for the request (eg GET, POST, DELETE). Default is POST
- `output_file` (String) Path to save the response output
- `parameters` (Map of String) smc api body as a json dictionary
- `query` (Map of String) smc api query parameter (eg ?filter=xxxxx)
